title_en: Core Verbs, Wants, and Food/Drink Choices
petrov_stage: Add high-frequency verbs without breaking the original pronoun frame.
petrov_mission: Ask what someone wants to eat or drink and answer with one clear preference.
focus_targets: New verbs keep the same pronoun frame

listening_tasks.prompt: Listen for one of these lesson anchors and identify the intent: 问, 看, 听, 吃.
Listen to a line that uses New verbs keep the same pronoun frame and Content question versus 吗 question and repeat the key detail correctly.

reading_tasks.prompt: Match these lesson items to their meanings: 问, 看, 听, 吃.
Rebuild one short sentence that uses New verbs keep the same pronoun frame with one lesson vocabulary item.

speaking_tasks.prompt: Ask what someone wants to eat or drink and answer with one clear preference.
Say in Chinese: What do you want to drink?

rapid_recall: Recall and say: 问, 看, 听, 吃, 喝.
Translate into Chinese: I want to drink water.
mock_pass_criteria: Uses at least two of these lesson anchors correctly: 问, 看, 听.
Produces one correct spoken line using New verbs keep the same pronoun frame.
Answers one follow-up without dropping completely out of Chinese.
